release_notes:
## What's New

- **Android**: Share button after export now works correctly
- **Android**: Export path no longer falls back to inaccessible private storage
- **Windows**: Update installer now correctly extracts the ZIP archive via PowerShell
- **Linux**: Update installer hint now shows the extraction path and copy instructions

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed PDF export crash on Android (Save As dialog now uses folder picker)
- Fixed share button silently failing on Android due to FileProvider scope
- Fixed Windows in-app update trying to execute a ZIP file as an installer
- Fixed Linux update hint falsely implying a restart completes the update
